bns:Component.name: HROpsConsole - Get Cases
bns:Component.bns:description: Returns all ER cases with timelines, tasks, and status for HR Ops Console case management

shape.name: shape2
shape.userlabel: All Cases with Timelines and Tasks

message.msgTxt: '{"cases":[{"id":"C-2024-001","type":"Employee Relations","subtype":"Misconduct","employeeId":"E005","employeeName":"Derek Thompson","title":"Policy Violation - Attendance","status":"Investigation","severity":"High","owner":"Sarah Reynolds","sla":"2024-03-15","created":"2024-02-20","updated":"2024-03-01","notes":"Employee has missed 8 days in past 30 without approved leave.","outcome":"","openTasks":1},{"id":"C-2024-002","type":"Accommodation","subtype":"Medical","employeeId":"E007","employeeName":"Carlos Martinez","title":"FMLA Leave Extension Request","status":"Approved","severity":"Medium","owner":"Amanda Foster","sla":"2024-03-20","created":"2024-02-10","updated":"2024-02-14","notes":"Return to work date confirmed: March 30. Benefits continuation active.","outcome":"Approved - FMLA extension through March 30, 2024.","openTasks":1},{"id":"C-2024-003","type":"Employee Relations","subtype":"Grievance","employeeId":"E003","employeeName":"Jordan Williams","title":"Pay Discrepancy Grievance","status":"Open","severity":"Critical","owner":"Sarah Reynolds","sla":"2024-03-10","created":"2024-02-28","updated":"2024-03-01","notes":"HRIS shows $95,000. Payroll records show $92,000. Discrepancy of $3,000.","outcome":"","openTasks":2},{"id":"C-2024-004","type":"Compliance","subtype":"Training","employeeId":"E002","employeeName":"Priya Patel","title":"Mandatory Training Overdue","status":"Open","severity":"Medium","owner":"Amanda Foster","sla":"2024-03-12","created":"2024-02-15","updated":"2024-02-20","notes":"Annual Harassment Prevention and Cybersecurity Awareness both overdue.","outcome":"","openTasks":1},{"id":"C-2024-005","type":"Integration","subtype":"Payroll Exception","employeeId":"E015","employeeName":"Omar Hassan","title":"Terminated Employee Active in Payroll","status":"Critical","severity":"Critical","owner":"Sarah Reynolds","sla":"2024-03-03","created":"2024-03-01","updated":"2024-03-01","notes":"Omar Hassan terminated Feb 28. Payroll still shows active with $5,000 salary. URGENT.","outcome":"","openTasks":2},{"id":"C-2024-006","type":"Performance","subtype":"PIP","employeeId":"E005","employeeName":"Derek Thompson","title":"Performance Improvement Plan","status":"Open","severity":"High","owner":"Sarah Reynolds","sla":"2024-04-01","created":"2024-03-01","updated":"2024-03-01","notes":"90-day PIP starting March 1. Manager Mike Torres is plan owner.","outcome":"","openTasks":2},{"id":"C-2024-007","type":"Employee Relations","subtype":"Policy Violation","employeeId":"E010","employeeName":"Tanya Jackson","title":"Expense Policy Violation","status":"Closed","severity":"Low","owner":"Amanda Foster","sla":"2024-02-28","created":"2024-02-05","updated":"2024-02-25","notes":"Minor expense policy violation. First offense. Verbal warning issued.","outcome":"Closed - Verbal warning issued. No further action required.","openTasks":0},{"id":"C-2024-008","type":"Accommodation","subtype":"Remote Work","employeeId":"E013","employeeName":"Kevin Zhao","title":"Remote Work Accommodation Request","status":"Under Review","severity":"Low","owner":"Dana Willis","sla":"2024-03-20","created":"2024-03-01","updated":"2024-03-01","notes":"Role is hybrid. Request requires manager and VP approval.","outcome":"","openTasks":1}]}'
